payload.answer: Committed one durable memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans. Duplicate retries of the same message were ignored.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam is identified only by first name and affiliation/context 'Goldman'; insufficient information to uniquely resolve to an existing entity. The same input was delivered three times, so it should be treated as one idempotent memory, not three duplicates.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Stored only one memory card despite the same input being delivered three times.
Preserved ambiguity for Sam and Goldman rather than over-resolving identities.
